source_basis: Fixture systematic-review example; no live database search or source verification performed.
what_i_can_verify: The artifact can represent systematic-review protocol, screening, exclusion, and flow fields.
what_remains_uncertain: All counts, search strings, and source metadata require actual project search execution.
user_verification_needed: Replace fixture values with a real protocol and executed search log before using this in scholarship.

tool_use_summary: No external tools or databases were queried.
gate_status: Not ready for scholarship until a real search protocol and execution log replace fixture values.
human_checkpoints: Human reviewer must approve scope, databases, filters, and inclusion/exclusion rules before execution.
process_passport.handoff_notes: Use this passport as a fixture for chained artifact validation, not as evidence of completed search work.

query_bank.notes: Synthetic fixture query; not an executed search.

priority_venues: Subject databases selected for the project
inclusion_criteria: Reports source basis or method transparently
exclusion_criteria: Not relevant to the review question
No accessible method or source basis
source_targets: Project-specific studies selected by the protocol
opposing_literature_targets: Sources that challenge the expected review pattern

search_log.notes: Fixture entry; no actual search claimed.

protocol_snapshot.review_question: Fixture review question for schema validation.
protocol_snapshot.scope: Fixture scope only; not a scholarly protocol.
inclusion_exclusion_rules: Include fixture records matching the fixture question.
Exclude fixture records outside the fixture scope.
reviewer_assumptions: Counts and searches are placeholders for contract validation.

exclusion_reasons.notes: No records screened in this fixture.
